stem: The following units are used to measure data size: gigabyte, bit, kilobyte, byte, megabyte, terabyte.
model_answer: From smallest to largest: bit, byte, kilobyte, megabyte, gigabyte, terabyte. A byte is 8 bits; thereafter each unit is 1000 times the previous one (using the J277 convention).

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Place the units in order of size, starting with the smallest.

mark_points.text: bit, byte, kilobyte, megabyte, gigabyte, terabyte (in that order)
accepted_alternatives: bit byte kilobyte megabyte gigabyte terabyte
bit byte kB MB GB TB
